title: AVERT Authorization Decision
description: Outcome of the AVERT Authorize step: whether the caller is permitted to act for the named entity, and what is missing if not. Grounded against the Apier reference implementation's acting-capacity logic.

decision.description: Authorization verdict. `full`: the caller may perform the requested action. `partial`: some but not all required permissions are present. `none`: the caller may not act for this entity.

organisation_number.description: Identifier of the entity the caller wishes to act for. In the Norwegian reference implementation this is a 9-digit Brønnøysund organisation number.

entity.description: The entity this authorization decision applies to.

granted_scopes.description: Permission scopes the caller currently holds for this entity.

missing_scopes.description: Permission scopes required for the intended action that the caller does not yet hold. Empty on a `full` decision.

code.description: Stable, machine-readable remediation code an agent can branch on.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of this remediation step.

fix_steps.description: Structured, machine-readable remediation steps. Populated when the decision is not `full`; empty otherwise.
